questions.title: 授权与拒绝码：准确解释

activity.prompt: 哪一句最适合用于“准确解释”？
choices: The safest response is to wait until every uncertainty disappears and avoid naming an owner or deadline.
Authorization optimization requires separating issuer decisions, technical failures and merchant errors.
Because authorization approval rate matters, we should launch globally before checking segments, evidence or controls.
activity.feedback: 正确表达同时保留了业务事实、授权批准率和可执行判断，没有跳过证据或护栏。

questions.prompt: 你正在处理“授权与拒绝码”场景。已知巴西授权批准率在发卡行结构变化后从 84.2% 降至 80.9%，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。
questions.task: 点击最符合业务事实、策略逻辑和专业语气的英文表达。
questions.hint: 优先保留结论、证据、授权批准率、行动和护栏，不要只复述背景。

answer.sample: Authorization optimization requires separating issuer decisions, technical failures and merchant errors. The current signal is that approval fell from 84.2% to 80.9% in Brazil after an issuer-mix shift. I recommend that we separate retryable failures and work with the acquirer on issuer-specific routing.
notes: 表达必须围绕授权批准率说明业务影响，避免只有语言形式而没有判断。

answer.translation: 授权优化需要区分发卡行决策、技术失败和商户错误。当前信号是巴西授权批准率在发卡行结构变化后从 84.2% 降至 80.9%。我建议区分可重试失败，并与收单行制定针对发卡行的路由方案。
